rationale: 6.9 years as a .NET Developer/Cloud Engineer (Accenture + Swiggy) with no ML/IR experience; self-described AI learner only and top skills are W&B, MongoDB, Docker — no embeddings, ranking, or retrieval work.

Career spans Sales Executive, Graphic Designer, and Marketing Manager roles at TCS and fictional companies (Wayne Enterprises, Initech) with zero engineering or ML depth; purely non-technical profile with AI curiosity only.

4.9 years at Google and Swiggy shipping LambdaMART/XGBoost ranking models and sentence-transformer + Elasticsearch-based recommendation systems at 10M+ user scale, with expert-level Elasticsearch and Recommendation Systems skills from IIT Roorkee.

8.5 years split across Mphasis, HCL, Mindtree (all IT services) in DevOps/QA roles with one product stint at Flipkart doing Android work; Milvus listed as an advanced skill but career shows no production ML or IR systems.

7 years as a .NET/QA Engineer mostly at Mphasis (IT services) and a fictional company Pied Piper; Qdrant listed as an intermediate skill but career shows DevOps/QA work only, no production ML or retrieval systems.

6.9 years at Microsoft, upGrad, Ola, and BYJU's building sentence-transformer + FAISS semantic search (500K docs), RAG pipelines with Pinecone, and production ML pipelines — expert proficiency in Sentence Transformers and Haystack from IIIT Hyderabad.

9.2 years as Marketing Manager and Customer Support at TCS and fictional companies (Stark Industries, Initech); entirely non-technical career with AI curiosity expressed only through online courses, no engineering background.
